content.text: You are applying a code migration fix. File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/datasources/details/DataSourcePageTitle.tsx Line: 47 Migration rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-label]: In PatternFly v6, icon content in
Let me read the file to understand the context around line 47.

Now let me reason through the fix:

**Analysis of line 47:**
```jsx
<Label isCompact>{t('Ready')}</Label>
```

The migration rule says: "If <Label> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop." and "If <Label> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon."

Looking at line 47, the `<Label>` contains only text (`{t('Ready')}`) — there is **no icon element** from `@patternfly/react-icons` inside this `<Label>`. The children are purely text content.

This migration rule is about moving icon children to the `icon` prop, but this `<Label>` has no icon children. The rule does not apply to this instance.

## Changes Applied

**No change applied.** The migration rule `sd-icon-children-to-prop-label` targets `<Label>` components that contain icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons` as children. The `<Label>` at line 47 contains only text content (`{t('Ready')}`), with no icon element present. The rule does not apply to this code.
